page.title: Jet Ski Rental Fuengirola | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Jet ski rental Fuengirola from Puerto Banús. Ride our Sea-Doo GTX at 50+ km/h. 3 pax, full gear included. Book your 1-hour session today.
data.summary: Rent a jet ski in Fuengirola from our base in Puerto Banús. Our Sea-Doo GTX seats 3, reaches 50+ km/h, and includes all safety gear. Book a 1-hour session with a licensed skipper escort.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX jet ski, 3.4m long, seats up to 3 passengers
Departs from Puerto Banús, 15 min ride to Fuengirola coast
Includes life jacket, insurance, and fuel
Skipper escort boat follows for safety
1-hour sessions available, pricing on request via WhatsApp
No licence required – full briefing provided before departure

faq.q: Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Fuengirola?
faq.a: No, you do not need a licence. All riders receive a full safety briefing and basic handling instructions before departure. A licensed skipper escort boat follows you throughout the session to ensure safety.

faq.q: How fast does the Sea-Doo GTX go?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX can reach speeds over 50 km/h (30+ knots), depending on sea conditions and passenger load. You control the throttle, so you can cruise or push it – your choice.

faq.q: How many people can ride on one jet ski?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX seats up to 3 people. It is 3.4m long and designed for comfortable riding with a driver and up to two passengers. Life jackets are provided for all riders.

faq.q: Where do we meet for the jet ski rental?
faq.a: You meet at Puerto Banús, our main departure point. From there, it is a 15-minute ride along the coast to Fuengirola. We will confirm the exact meeting point via WhatsApp after booking.

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski rental price?
faq.a: Your rental includes the Sea-Doo GTX jet ski, life jackets, fuel, insurance, and a safety briefing. A licensed skipper escort boat accompanies you. Pricing is on request – contact us via WhatsApp for a quote.

faq.q: Can I rent a jet ski for longer than 1 hour?
faq.a: Yes, we offer flexible session durations. The standard is 1 hour, but you can book 2 hours or more. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a longer rental. Availability depends on the season.

faq.q: Is it safe to ride a jet ski near Fuengirola?
faq.a: Yes, it is safe. The Fuengirola coastline has calm waters, especially in summer. Our escort boat stays close at all times. We monitor weather conditions and will cancel or reschedule if wind or waves exceed safe limits.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on the day of my booking?
faq.a: We monitor conditions closely. If wind or waves make jet skiing unsafe, we will contact you to reschedule or offer a full refund. Your safety is our priority – we never run in rough seas.

data.body_html:
Jet ski rental Fuengirola gives you the fastest way to explore the Costa del Sol from the water. Our Sea-Doo GTX seats up to 3 passengers, hits over 50 km/h, and departs from Puerto Banús – just 15 minutes from Fuengirola's coastline. No licence needed, full briefing provided, and a licensed skipper escort follows you for safety. All gear, fuel, and insurance are included. Pricing is on request – message us on WhatsApp to book your session.

Our Jet Ski: Sea-Doo GTX

The Sea-Doo GTX is 3.4 metres long and seats 3 people (driver plus two passengers). It is a powerful, stable watercraft designed for both cruising and high-speed riding. You control the speed – from a gentle cruise along the shore to a full-throttle run across the bay. The GTX features an intelligent brake and reverse system, making it easy to manoeuvre even for first-time riders. We provide life jackets for all passengers and a full safety briefing before you launch.

Riding from Puerto Banús to Fuengirola

Your session starts at Puerto Banús, the iconic marina on Marbella's Golden Mile. From there, you ride east along the coast, passing the sand beaches of San Pedro Alcántara and the dunes of Artola-Cabopino. Within 15 minutes you reach Fuengirola's waterfront, with its long promenade and castle. You can stop for photos, explore coves like Cala del Faro, or simply enjoy the open water. The escort boat stays within sight at all times.

Fuengirola Coastline – What to Expect

Fuengirola offers calm, sheltered waters for most of the year. Sea temperatures range from 15°C in winter to 25°C in August. The coast is lined with beaches – Fuengirola Beach, Los Boliches, and Carvajal – all visible from the water. To the west, you see the Sierra Blanca mountains and La Concha peak. The water is clear, and on calm days you can see the seabed at 5–10 metres depth. Jet skiing here is smooth and scenic.

What's Included in Your Rental

  • Sea-Doo GTX jet ski (3.4m, 3 pax)
  • Life jackets for all riders
  • Fuel for the session
  • Insurance (third-party liability and damage waiver)
  • Full safety briefing and basic handling instruction
  • Licensed skipper escort boat
  • Spanish IVA (21% VAT)

Pricing is on request. Contact us via WhatsApp to get a quote for 1 hour, 2 hours, or longer sessions. We operate year-round, weather permitting.

How to Book Your Jet Ski in Fuengirola

Booking is simple. Send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, time, and number of riders. We will confirm availability and send you a price quote. No deposit is required – payment is on the day, before departure. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance, especially in July and August when demand is highest. Browse our full fleet for other options like speedboats or yachts.

Safety and Requirements

No licence is needed to ride our jet ski. You must be at least 18 years old to drive (16 with parental consent). All riders receive a 10-minute briefing covering controls, hand signals, and local navigation rules. The escort boat carries a first aid kit and VHF radio. We monitor weather forecasts and will cancel if wind exceeds 15 knots or visibility drops. In that case, you can reschedule or get a full refund.

Combining Jet Ski with Other Rentals

If you want more time on the water, consider combining a jet ski session with a boat rental in Marbella. Many guests book a morning on a speedboat like the Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax) and an afternoon jet ski ride. Or, after your jet ski session, relax on a yacht charter. We can arrange multi-activity days – just ask via WhatsApp.

Frequently asked questions

Do I need a licence to rent a jet ski in Fuengirola?

No, you do not need a licence. All riders receive a full safety briefing and basic handling instructions before departure. A licensed skipper escort boat follows you throughout the session to ensure safety.

How fast does the Sea-Doo GTX go?

The Sea-Doo GTX can reach speeds over 50 km/h (30+ knots), depending on sea conditions and passenger load. You control the throttle, so you can cruise or push it – your choice.

How many people can ride on one jet ski?

The Sea-Doo GTX seats up to 3 people. It is 3.4m long and designed for comfortable riding with a driver and up to two passengers. Life jackets are provided for all riders.

Where do we meet for the jet ski rental?

You meet at Puerto Banús, our main departure point. From there, it is a 15-minute ride along the coast to Fuengirola. We will confirm the exact meeting point via WhatsApp after booking.

What is included in the jet ski rental price?

Your rental includes the Sea-Doo GTX jet ski, life jackets, fuel, insurance, and a safety briefing. A licensed skipper escort boat accompanies you. Pricing is on request – contact us via WhatsApp for a quote.

Can I rent a jet ski for longer than 1 hour?

Yes, we offer flexible session durations. The standard is 1 hour, but you can book 2 hours or more. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a longer rental. Availability depends on the season.

Is it safe to ride a jet ski near Fuengirola?

Yes, it is safe. The Fuengirola coastline has calm waters, especially in summer. Our escort boat stays close at all times. We monitor weather conditions and will cancel or reschedule if wind or waves exceed safe limits.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day of my booking?

We monitor conditions closely. If wind or waves make jet skiing unsafe, we will contact you to reschedule or offer a full refund. Your safety is our priority – we never run in rough seas.
